title: Schema Mapping
description: Map source database tables and columns to their OMOP CDM equivalents. The AI suggests mappings based on field names and data patterns — you review, adjust, and approve before the ETL runs.
tips: Use 'AI Suggest' to auto-populate mappings — it typically covers 80%+ of fields correctly.
Required OMOP columns are highlighted — unmapped required fields will block ETL execution.
Hover over a source field name to see sample values from the WhiteRabbit scan report.
Date fields need a format string (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD) — check source data before confirming.
Save mappings frequently; unsaved changes are lost on navigation.
